isi.lyrics:
Lyric EXO - Flatline

Romanization

maeil pado wi
illeongin illeongin illeongin Heartbeat
neul jinachin dugeunggeorimgwa
moradakchin meolmi
modeun giri hangsang natseon chae
doemutji Left or right

byeonhaeganeun sesanggwa
burane seotun na
(Don't need say much)
aesseo dwiteullin gamjeong soge neol bulleo
jeomjeom deo gipeun got
padoui neomeoro
geu kkeuti neoramyeon jamgyeodo nan

So when I flatline
nal jibeosamkineun Blue
padoe gidae
gappeuge naeswineun sum
eodumui kkeuteseo balgyeonhan
challanhan sumyeon wi neoraneun byeol
Loving you like it's the last time
I could die I could flatline

chan baramgwa
gireojin gireojin gireojin bami
nae pyeonira mitgo
jamdeun jeok eopji gamhi
bamgwa naji jaril bakkul ttae
nan jjalbeun kkumeul kkwo

nalkaroun sesange
myeot beoneul neomeojyeo (dasi neomeojyeo)
dareun hyungteoe hyungteoga deopyeojin mam
jeomjeom deo gipeun got
badaui neomeodo
nae kkeuti neoin geol araseo nan
(nega isseoseo nan)

So when I flatline
nal jibeosamkineun Blue
padoe gidae
gappeuge naeswineun sum
eodumui kkeuteseo balgyeonhan
challanhan sumyeon wi neoraneun byeol
Loving you like it's the last time
I could die I could flatline

Flatline i sunggan
neowa mannan na
gijeokboda ummyeong gata
gireotdeon pyoryureul kkeutnae
Flatline i sunggan
neowa gateun mam
seoroui guwoni doeeo
machimnae mannan sesang

So when I flatline
nal jibeosamkineun Blue
padoe gidae
gappeuge naeswineun sum
eodumui kkeuteseo balgyeonhan
challanhan sumyeon wi neoraneun byeol
Loving you like it's the last time
I could die I could flatline

Hangeul

매일 파도 위
일렁인 일렁인 일렁인 Heartbeat
늘 지나친 두근거림과
몰아닥친 멀미
모든 길이 항상 낯선 채
되묻지 Left or right

변해가는 세상과
불안에 서툰 나
(Don't need say much)
애써 뒤틀린 감정 속에 널 불러
점점 더 깊은 곳
파도의 너머로
그 끝이 너라면 잠겨도 난

So when I flatline
날 집어삼키는 Blue
파도에 기대
가쁘게 내쉬는 숨
어둠의 끝에서 발견한
찬란한 수면 위 너라는 별
Loving you like it's the last time
I could die I could flatline

찬 바람과
길어진 길어진 길어진 밤이
내 편이라 믿고
잠든 적 없지 감히
밤과 낮이 자릴 바꿀 때
난 짧은 꿈을 꿔

날카로운 세상에
몇 번을 넘어져 (다시 넘어져)
다른 흉터에 흉터가 덮여진 맘
점점 더 깊은 곳
바다의 너머도
내 끝이 너인 걸 알아서 난
(네가 있어서 난)

So when I flatline
날 집어삼키는 Blue
파도에 기대
가쁘게 내쉬는 숨
어둠의 끝에서 발견한
찬란한 수면 위 너라는 별
Loving you like it's the last time
I could die I could flatline

Flatline 이 순간
너와 만난 나
기적보다 운명 같아
길었던 표류를 끝내
Flatline 이 순간
너와 같은 맘
서로의 구원이 되어
마침내 만난 세상

So when I flatline
날 집어삼키는 Blue
파도에 기대
가쁘게 내쉬는 숨
어둠의 끝에서 발견한
찬란한 수면 위 너라는 별
Loving you like it's the last time
I could die I could flatline

isi.lyrics:

Romanization

dachil georaneun geol ara
byeogeul sewobwado gansinhi
ne apeman seomyeon imi
mameun giureojyeo ajjilhi
nuni majuchineun sunggan
eojireowo modeun gamgagi
Yeah mami mareul deutjil ana
jeeoga an dwae

Playing with fire
dansume nal sarojaba
We know where it goes
yeah girl here it goes

Touch and go baby touch and go
cheonsareul dalmeun geu miso
neon swipge byeogeul heomulgon
yuyuhi meoreojyeoga tto yeah
Touch and go baby touch and go
eongmangi doel geol arado
beombeoni neoui apeseon
muneojyeo naeryeo domino Like

Oh Can't stop
heeo naol suga eopseo
seontaekjineun neoppunin geol
It’s touch and go touch and go
Oh Can't stop
babocheoreom boindaedo
neoegeman ireoneun geol
It’s touch and go touch and go

ullyeodaeneun Warning

nae gwieneun ojik ne Voices
dalkomhan Favorite song
We can fall in love in one night
Imma make it feel so right
mangseorigo sipji ana
hammadimyeon chungbunhae nan

Playing with fire
jeombu naega taekhan geoya

yeah girl here it goes

i sunggammajeo heulleogajana

Touch and go baby touch and go

Playing with fire

isi.lyrics:
Lyric EXO - Crown

Romanization

Yeah ne ape naeryeowa
gikkeoi badeul Crown
Now we back & touching down
It’s the king of the town
On the streets see the crowd
Take that gajyeodo dwae modeun geol
Yeah we comin’ for that

Yeah neoege nae jeombureul georeo
Now we comin’ for that
jeoldae nugudo heorakhal su eopseo

manggajideorado da deonjyeo
neol wihae jikyeonael Crown
Comin’ for that
yuilhan juineun neonikka
soneul ppeodeo mangseoriji ma
Comin’ to the throne

ip matchun geu sunggan neukkin Truth yeah
neoraneun ummyeongui jangnan gateun Pain
swipge mameul ppaetgyeoga
seontaekjineun hana Ride or die

Yeah sirens in the night whoa
neoreul norineun Sight whoa
gatgo sipeo da
Yeah majuchineun siseon sok nal kkeuneun son
umjigil su eopge nal mandeureo neon

neoreul hyanghan yegameun
hana dul maebeon jeokjunghae
simjangeul pagodeun gamgagi
saegyeojyeo naege

manggajideorado da deonjyeo
neol wihae jikyeonael Crown

yuilhan juineun neonikka
soneul ppeodeo mangseoriji ma

jeo sumaneun nuni wommangeul hae
nan ojik ne nunggil hanamyeon dwae
Hard truth or hard for you to see
nameun geon ojik neoui seontaekppun

Yeah sirens in the night whoa
imi sijakdoen Fight whoa
huhoeneun eopseo nan
Yeah jophyeojineun siya sok nal hyanghan son
geugeomyeon nan doeneun geol

neoreul hyanghan peojeuri
hana dul matchwojyeo kkeutnae
gidarin sigani dagawa
Rise until the end
Comin' for that

Yeah neoege nae jeombureul georeo
Now we comin’ for that
jeoldae nugudo heorakhal su eopseo

manggajideorado da deonjyeo
neol wihae jikyeonael Crown
Comin’ for that
yuilhan juineun neonikka
soneul ppeodeo mangseoriji ma
Comin’ to the throne

ije nugudo makji mothal
jarie da wasseo
gin jangmyeondeureul jina neol majuhaji

Comin’ for that

manggajideorado da deonjyeo
neol wihae jikyeonael Crown
Comin’ for that
yuilhan juineun neonikka
soneul ppeodeo mangseoriji ma

망가지더라도 다 던져

Comin’ for that
유일한 주인은 너니까
손을 뻗어 망설이지 마

너라는 운명의 장난 같은 Pain
쉽게 맘을 뺏겨가
